tables.name: users
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE users (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  username TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  full_name TEXT,
  profile_json TEXT,
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

tables.name: organizations
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE organizations (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  org_code TEXT UNIQUE,
  name TEXT NOT NULL,
  type TEXT CHECK(type IN ('nonprofit','corporate')) NOT NULL,
  country TEXT,
  website TEXT,
  owner_user_id INTEGER,
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY(owner_user_id) REFERENCES users(id)
);

tables.name: themes
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE themes (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  code TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  name TEXT NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_themes_code ON themes(code);

tables.name: projects
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE projects (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  project_code TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  organization_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
  title TEXT NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  country TEXT NOT NULL,
  goal_amount REAL NOT NULL CHECK(goal_amount >= 0),
  currency TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'USD',
  status TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(status IN ('draft','active','completed','suspended','closed')),
  start_date DATE,
  end_date DATE,
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY(organization_id) REFERENCES organizations(id)
);
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_projects_project_code ON projects(project_code);
CREATE INDEX idx_projects_status_country ON projects(status, country);

tables.name: project_themes
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE project_themes (
  project_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
  theme_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY(project_id, theme_id),
  FOREIGN KEY(project_id) REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  FOREIGN KEY(theme_id) REFERENCES themes(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

tables.name: project_budget_items
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE project_budget_items (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  project_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
  category_name TEXT NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  amount REAL NOT NULL CHECK(amount >= 0),
  currency TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'USD',
  sort_order INTEGER,
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY(project_id) REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

tables.name: project_milestones
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE project_milestones (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  project_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
  title TEXT NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  target_date DATE,
  status TEXT CHECK(status IN ('planned','in_progress','completed','cancelled')) DEFAULT 'planned',
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY(project_id) REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

tables.name: project_status_updates
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE project_status_updates (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  project_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
  author_user_id INTEGER,
  content TEXT NOT NULL,
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY(project_id) REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  FOREIGN KEY(author_user_id) REFERENCES users(id)
);

tables.name: project_disbursement_preferences
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE project_disbursement_preferences (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  project_id INTEGER NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  organization_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
  method TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(method IN ('bank_transfer','mobile_money','check','paypal')),
  schedule TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(schedule IN ('monthly','quarterly','annual','on_threshold')),
  currency TEXT NOT NULL,
  bank_account_json TEXT,
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY(project_id) REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  FOREIGN KEY(organization_id) REFERENCES organizations(id)
);

tables.name: donation_baskets
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE donation_baskets (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
  status TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(status IN ('open','checked_out','abandoned')) DEFAULT 'open',
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY(user_id) REFERENCES users(id)
);
indexes: CREATE INDEX idx_baskets_user_status ON donation_baskets(user_id, status);

tables.name: donation_basket_items
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE donation_basket_items (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  basket_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
  project_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
  amount REAL NOT NULL CHECK(amount > 0),
  currency TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'USD',
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY(basket_id) REFERENCES donation_baskets(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  FOREIGN KEY(project_id) REFERENCES projects(id)
);

tables.name: corporate_campaigns
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE corporate_campaigns (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  campaign_code TEXT UNIQUE,
  organization_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
  title TEXT NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  start_date DATE NOT NULL,
  end_date DATE NOT NULL,
  owner_user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
  match_ratio_employee REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 1.0,
  match_ratio_corporate REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 1.0,
  max_match_per_employee REAL,
  currency TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'USD',
  theme_scope TEXT CHECK(theme_scope IN ('any','climate','education','health','custom')) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'any',
  active INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  weekly_summary_emails_enabled INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY(organization_id) REFERENCES organizations(id),
  FOREIGN KEY(owner_user_id) REFERENCES users(id)
);
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_campaigns_code ON corporate_campaigns(campaign_code);
CREATE INDEX idx_campaigns_org_dates ON corporate_campaigns(organization_id, start_date, end_date);

tables.name: campaign_theme_filters
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE campaign_theme_filters (
  campaign_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
  theme_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY(campaign_id, theme_id),
  FOREIGN KEY(campaign_id) REFERENCES corporate_campaigns(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  FOREIGN KEY(theme_id) REFERENCES themes(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

tables.name: donations
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE donations (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id INTEGER,
  project_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
  organization_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
  amount REAL NOT NULL CHECK(amount > 0),
  currency TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'USD',
  donation_date DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  is_anonymous INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  payment_status TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(payment_status IN ('pending','succeeded','failed','refunded')) DEFAULT 'succeeded',
  source TEXT CHECK(source IN ('one_time','recurring','gift_card','corporate_match')) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'one_time',
  corporate_campaign_id INTEGER,
  recurring_donation_id INTEGER,
  gift_card_id INTEGER,
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY(user_id) REFERENCES users(id),
  FOREIGN KEY(project_id) REFERENCES projects(id),
  FOREIGN KEY(organization_id) REFERENCES organizations(id),
  FOREIGN KEY(corporate_campaign_id) REFERENCES corporate_campaigns(id),
  FOREIGN KEY(recurring_donation_id) REFERENCES recurring_donations(id),
  FOREIGN KEY(gift_card_id) REFERENCES gift_cards(id)
);
indexes: CREATE INDEX idx_donations_user_date ON donations(user_id, donation_date);

tables.name: recurring_donations
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE recurring_donations (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
  project_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
  amount REAL NOT NULL CHECK(amount > 0),
  currency TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'USD',
  frequency TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(frequency IN ('monthly','quarterly','annual')),
  start_date DATE NOT NULL,
  end_date DATE,
  status TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(status IN ('active','paused','cancelled')) DEFAULT 'active',
  annual_increase_percent REAL DEFAULT 0.0,
  next_charge_date DATE,
  last_charge_date DATE,
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY(user_id) REFERENCES users(id),
  FOREIGN KEY(project_id) REFERENCES projects(id)
);
indexes: CREATE INDEX idx_recurring_user_status ON recurring_donations(user_id, status);

tables.name: gift_cards
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE gift_cards (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  code TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  label TEXT,
  purchaser_user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
  initial_amount REAL NOT NULL CHECK(initial_amount > 0),
  remaining_amount REAL NOT NULL CHECK(remaining_amount >= 0),
  currency TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'USD',
  recipient_email TEXT,
  message TEXT,
  status TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(status IN ('active','redeemed','expired','cancelled')) DEFAULT 'active',
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY(purchaser_user_id) REFERENCES users(id)
);
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_gift_cards_code ON gift_cards(code);

tables.name: impact_metrics
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE impact_metrics (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  project_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
  theme_id INTEGER,
  period_start DATE,
  period_end DATE,
  metric_type TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(metric_type IN ('trees_planted','students_reached','patients_served')),
  quantity REAL NOT NULL CHECK(quantity >= 0),
  unit TEXT,
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY(project_id) REFERENCES projects(id),
  FOREIGN KEY(theme_id) REFERENCES themes(id)
);
indexes: CREATE INDEX idx_impact_project_metric ON impact_metrics(project_id, metric_type);

tables.name: users
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE users (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    username TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
    email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
    full_name TEXT,
    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at DATETIME
);

tables.name: customers
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE customers (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    name TEXT NOT NULL,
    customer_type TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (customer_type IN ('Residential','Commercial')),
    phone TEXT,
    email TEXT,
    default_billing_address_line1 TEXT,
    default_billing_address_line2 TEXT,
    default_billing_city TEXT,
    default_billing_state TEXT,
    default_billing_postal_code TEXT,
    default_billing_country TEXT DEFAULT 'USA',
    created_by_user_id INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at DATETIME,
    FOREIGN KEY (created_by_user_id) REFERENCES users(id)
);

tables.name: service_locations
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE service_locations (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    customer_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    label TEXT,
    address_line1 TEXT NOT NULL,
    address_line2 TEXT,
    city TEXT NOT NULL,
    state TEXT NOT NULL,
    postal_code TEXT NOT NULL,
    country TEXT DEFAULT 'USA',
    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at DATETIME,
    FOREIGN KEY (customer_id) REFERENCES customers(id)
);

tables.name: technicians
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE technicians (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    name TEXT NOT NULL,
    email TEXT,
    phone TEXT,
    active INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at DATETIME
);

tables.name: job_types
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE job_types (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    name TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    description TEXT,
    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at DATETIME
);

tables.name: jobs
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE jobs (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    job_number TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
    customer_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    service_location_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    job_type_id INTEGER,
    problem_description TEXT,
    priority TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (priority IN ('Low','Medium','High','Emergency')),
    status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Scheduled',
    scheduled_start DATETIME,
    scheduled_end DATETIME,
    created_by_user_id INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at DATETIME,
    FOREIGN KEY (customer_id) REFERENCES customers(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (service_location_id) REFERENCES service_locations(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (job_type_id) REFERENCES job_types(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (created_by_user_id) REFERENCES users(id)
);

tables.name: job_assignments
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE job_assignments (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    job_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    technician_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    assignment_order INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
    start_datetime DATETIME,
    end_datetime DATETIME,
    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at DATETIME,
    FOREIGN KEY (job_id) REFERENCES jobs(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    FOREIGN KEY (technician_id) REFERENCES technicians(id)
);
indexes: CREATE INDEX idx_job_assignments_technician_id_start ON job_assignments(technician_id, start_datetime);

tables.name: tags
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE tags (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    name TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    category TEXT,
    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at DATETIME
);

tables.name: job_tags
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE job_tags (
    job_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    tag_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    PRIMARY KEY (job_id, tag_id),
    FOREIGN KEY (job_id) REFERENCES jobs(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    FOREIGN KEY (tag_id) REFERENCES tags(id)
);

tables.name: equipment
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE equipment (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    customer_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    service_location_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    name TEXT NOT NULL,
    serial_number TEXT,
    install_date DATE,
    notes TEXT,
    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at DATETIME,
    FOREIGN KEY (customer_id) REFERENCES customers(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (service_location_id) REFERENCES service_locations(id)
);

tables.name: equipment_tags
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE equipment_tags (
    equipment_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    tag_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    PRIMARY KEY (equipment_id, tag_id),
    FOREIGN KEY (equipment_id) REFERENCES equipment(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    FOREIGN KEY (tag_id) REFERENCES tags(id)
);

tables.name: job_notes
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE job_notes (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    job_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    author_user_id INTEGER,
    note_type TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (note_type IN ('Internal','CustomerVisible')),
    content TEXT NOT NULL,
    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at DATETIME,
    FOREIGN KEY (job_id) REFERENCES jobs(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    FOREIGN KEY (author_user_id) REFERENCES users(id)
);

tables.name: time_entries
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE time_entries (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    job_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    technician_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    clock_in DATETIME NOT NULL,
    clock_out DATETIME,
    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at DATETIME,
    FOREIGN KEY (job_id) REFERENCES jobs(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    FOREIGN KEY (technician_id) REFERENCES technicians(id)
);

tables.name: pricebook_items
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE pricebook_items (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    sku TEXT UNIQUE,
    name TEXT NOT NULL,
    description TEXT,
    item_type TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (item_type IN ('Service','Material','Other')),
    default_unit_price REAL NOT NULL,
    taxable INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at DATETIME
);

tables.name: estimates
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE estimates (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    estimate_number TEXT UNIQUE,
    job_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    customer_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    status TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (status IN ('Draft','Presented','Approved','Converted')) DEFAULT 'Draft',
    subtotal REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    tax_amount REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    total_amount REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    created_by_user_id INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at DATETIME,
    FOREIGN KEY (job_id) REFERENCES jobs(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    FOREIGN KEY (customer_id) REFERENCES customers(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (created_by_user_id) REFERENCES users(id)
);

tables.name: estimate_line_items
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE estimate_line_items (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    estimate_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    line_number INTEGER NOT NULL,
    pricebook_item_id INTEGER,
    description TEXT NOT NULL,
    quantity REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
    unit_price REAL NOT NULL,
    line_total REAL NOT NULL,
    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at DATETIME,
    FOREIGN KEY (estimate_id) REFERENCES estimates(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    FOREIGN KEY (pricebook_item_id) REFERENCES pricebook_items(id)
);

tables.name: invoices
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE invoices (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    invoice_number TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
    job_id INTEGER,
    customer_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    source_estimate_id INTEGER,
    status TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (status IN ('Draft','Sent','PartiallyPaid','Paid','Void')) DEFAULT 'Draft',
    subtotal REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    tax_amount REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    total_amount REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    balance_due REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    invoice_date DATE NOT NULL,
    created_by_user_id INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at DATETIME,
    FOREIGN KEY (job_id) REFERENCES jobs(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (customer_id) REFERENCES customers(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (source_estimate_id) REFERENCES estimates(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (created_by_user_id) REFERENCES users(id)
);

tables.name: invoice_line_items
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE invoice_line_items (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    invoice_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    line_number INTEGER NOT NULL,
    pricebook_item_id INTEGER,
    description TEXT NOT NULL,
    quantity REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
    unit_price REAL NOT NULL,
    line_total REAL NOT NULL,
    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at DATETIME,
    FOREIGN KEY (invoice_id) REFERENCES invoices(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    FOREIGN KEY (pricebook_item_id) REFERENCES pricebook_items(id)
);

tables.name: payments
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE payments (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    invoice_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    customer_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    payment_date DATETIME NOT NULL,
    amount REAL NOT NULL,
    payment_method TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (payment_method IN ('Cash','Check','CreditCard','ACH','Other')),
    reference_number TEXT,
    created_by_user_id INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at DATETIME,
    FOREIGN KEY (invoice_id) REFERENCES invoices(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    FOREIGN KEY (customer_id) REFERENCES customers(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (created_by_user_id) REFERENCES users(id)
);

tables.name: signatures
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE signatures (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    invoice_id INTEGER,
    estimate_id INTEGER,
    label TEXT,
    signed_by_name TEXT,
    signed_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    signature_image BLOB,
    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at DATETIME,
    FOREIGN KEY (invoice_id) REFERENCES invoices(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    FOREIGN KEY (estimate_id) REFERENCES estimates(id)
);

tables.name: service_plans
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE service_plans (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    name TEXT NOT NULL,
    description TEXT,
    visits_per_year INTEGER NOT NULL,
    duration_years INTEGER NOT NULL,
    billing_frequency TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (billing_frequency IN ('Monthly','Annual')),
    monthly_price REAL,
    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at DATETIME
);

tables.name: customer_service_plans
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE customer_service_plans (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    customer_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    service_location_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    equipment_id INTEGER,
    service_plan_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    start_date DATE NOT NULL,
    end_date DATE,
    status TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (status IN ('Active','Cancelled','Expired')) DEFAULT 'Active',
    billing_amount REAL NOT NULL,
    billing_frequency TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (billing_frequency IN ('Monthly','Annual')),
    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at DATETIME,
    FOREIGN KEY (customer_id) REFERENCES customers(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (service_location_id) REFERENCES service_locations(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (equipment_id) REFERENCES equipment(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (service_plan_id) REFERENCES service_plans(id)
);

tables.name: service_plan_visits
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE service_plan_visits (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    customer_service_plan_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    job_id INTEGER,
    scheduled_datetime DATETIME,
    scheduled_time_window_start DATETIME,
    scheduled_time_window_end DATETIME,
    visit_number INTEGER NOT NULL,
    status TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (status IN ('Planned','Scheduled','Completed','Missed','Cancelled')) DEFAULT 'Planned',
    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at DATETIME,
    FOREIGN KEY (customer_service_plan_id) REFERENCES customer_service_plans(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    FOREIGN KEY (job_id) REFERENCES jobs(id)
);

tables.name: users
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE users (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  username TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  full_name TEXT,
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

tables.name: restaurants
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE restaurants (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  name TEXT NOT NULL,
  timezone TEXT,
  address TEXT,
  phone TEXT,
  created_by_user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (created_by_user_id) REFERENCES users(id)
);
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_restaurants_name ON restaurants(name);

tables.name: meal_periods
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE meal_periods (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  restaurant_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
  name TEXT NOT NULL,
  start_time TEXT NOT NULL,
  end_time TEXT NOT NULL,
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (restaurant_id) REFERENCES restaurants(id),
  UNIQUE (restaurant_id, name)
);

tables.name: floor_plans
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE floor_plans (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  restaurant_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
  name TEXT NOT NULL,
  is_active INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (restaurant_id) REFERENCES restaurants(id),
  UNIQUE (restaurant_id, name)
);

tables.name: tables
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE tables (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  restaurant_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
  floor_plan_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
  label TEXT NOT NULL,
  capacity_min INTEGER,
  capacity_max INTEGER NOT NULL,
  default_turn_time_minutes INTEGER,
  is_active INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (restaurant_id) REFERENCES restaurants(id),
  FOREIGN KEY (floor_plan_id) REFERENCES floor_plans(id),
  UNIQUE (restaurant_id, label)
);

tables.name: table_combinations
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE table_combinations (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  restaurant_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
  name TEXT,
  capacity_min INTEGER,
  capacity_max INTEGER NOT NULL,

    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    name TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    unit_of_measure TEXT,
    par_level REAL,
    allergen_flags TEXT,
    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at DATETIME
);
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_ingredients_name ON ingredients(name);

tables.name: recipe_ingredients
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE recipe_ingredients (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    recipe_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    ingredient_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    quantity REAL NOT NULL,
    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at DATETIME,
    FOREIGN KEY (recipe_id) REFERENCES recipes(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    FOREIGN KEY (ingredient_id) REFERENCES ingredients(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT,
    UNIQUE (recipe_id, ingredient_id)
);

tables.name: prep_batches
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE prep_batches (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    recipe_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    batch_size REAL NOT NULL,
    batch_unit TEXT NOT NULL,
    station_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    batch_status TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (batch_status IN ('scheduled','in_progress','done','cancelled')),
    scheduled_start_time DATETIME,
    scheduled_end_time DATETIME,
    actual_start_time DATETIME,
    actual_end_time DATETIME,
    created_by_user_id INTEGER,
    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at DATETIME,
    FOREIGN KEY (recipe_id) REFERENCES recipes(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (station_id) REFERENCES prep_stations(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (created_by_user_id) REFERENCES users(id)
);

tables.name: order_tickets
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE order_tickets (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    ticket_number TEXT NOT NULL,
    due_time DATETIME NOT NULL,
    created_time DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    priority TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (priority IN ('low','normal','high','rush')),
    status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'open' CHECK (status IN ('open','in_progress','completed','cancelled')),
    completed_time DATETIME,
    created_by_user_id INTEGER,
    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at DATETIME,
    FOREIGN KEY (created_by_user_id) REFERENCES users(id),
    UNIQUE (ticket_number, created_time)
);

tables.name: ticket_items
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE ticket_items (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    order_ticket_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    recipe_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    quantity INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (quantity > 0),
    modifier_text TEXT,
    status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'queued' CHECK (status IN ('queued','in_progress','done','cancelled')),
    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at DATETIME,
    FOREIGN KEY (order_ticket_id) REFERENCES order_tickets(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    FOREIGN KEY (recipe_id) REFERENCES recipes(id)
);

tables.name: station_tasks
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE station_tasks (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    station_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    task_type TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (task_type IN ('prep','cook','assemble','plate','other')),
    order_ticket_id INTEGER,
    ticket_item_id INTEGER,
    recipe_id INTEGER,
    recipe_step_id INTEGER,
    prep_batch_id INTEGER,
    description TEXT,
    quantity REAL,
    unit TEXT,
    priority TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (priority IN ('low','normal','high','rush')),
    status TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (status IN ('queued','in_progress','done','snoozed','cancelled')),
    scheduled_start_time DATETIME,
    scheduled_end_time DATETIME,
    actual_start_time DATETIME,
    actual_end_time DATETIME,
    snoozed_until DATETIME,
    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at DATETIME,
    FOREIGN KEY (station_id) REFERENCES prep_stations(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (order_ticket_id) REFERENCES order_tickets(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (ticket_item_id) REFERENCES ticket_items(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (recipe_id) REFERENCES recipes(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (recipe_step_id) REFERENCES recipe_steps(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (prep_batch_id) REFERENCES prep_batches(id)
);
indexes: CREATE INDEX idx_station_tasks_station_time ON station_tasks(station_id, scheduled_start_time);

tables.name: kitchen_performance_summaries
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE kitchen_performance_summaries (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    timeframe_start DATETIME NOT NULL,
    timeframe_end DATETIME NOT NULL,
    late_ticket_count INTEGER NOT NULL,
    average_lateness_minutes REAL NOT NULL,
    top_station1_id INTEGER,
    top_station1_load REAL,
    top_station2_id INTEGER,
    top_station2_load REAL,
    generated_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    generated_by_user_id INTEGER,
    FOREIGN KEY (top_station1_id) REFERENCES prep_stations(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (top_station2_id) REFERENCES prep_stations(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (generated_by_user_id) REFERENCES users(id)
);

tables.name: users
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE users (

  username TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,

tables.name: projects

  created_by INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,

  FOREIGN KEY (created_by) REFERENCES users(id)
);

tables.name: project_sites

CREATE TABLE project_sites (

);

tables.name: site_permits
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE site_permits (

  permit_number TEXT NOT NULL,
  permit_type TEXT,
  issued_date TEXT,
  expiry_date TEXT,
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,

);

tables.name: site_safety_requirements
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE site_safety_requirements (

  site_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
  requirement_text TEXT NOT NULL,
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (site_id) REFERENCES project_sites(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

tables.name: phases
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE phases (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  project_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
  name TEXT NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  planned_start_date TEXT NOT NULL,
  planned_end_date TEXT NOT NULL,
  actual_start_date TEXT,
  actual_end_date TEXT,
  planned_cost REAL,
  actual_cost REAL,

  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,

);

tables.name: phase_dependencies
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE phase_dependencies (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  phase_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
  depends_on_phase_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE(phase_id, depends_on_phase_id),
  FOREIGN KEY (phase_id) REFERENCES phases(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,

);

tables.name: subcontractors
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE subcontractors (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  name TEXT NOT NULL,
  trade_type TEXT NOT NULL,
  insurance_expiry TEXT,
  phone TEXT,
  email TEXT,
  address TEXT,
  is_active INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

tables.name: tasks
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE tasks (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  phase_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
  name TEXT NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  assigned_to TEXT,
  subcontractor_id INTEGER,
  estimated_hours REAL,
  actual_hours REAL DEFAULT 0,
  progress_status TEXT NOT NULL,
  planned_start_date TEXT,
  planned_end_date TEXT,
  actual_start_date TEXT,
  actual_end_date TEXT,
  estimated_cost REAL,
  actual_cost REAL DEFAULT 0,
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,

  FOREIGN KEY (phase_id) REFERENCES phases(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,

);

tables.name: workers
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE workers (

);

tables.name: timesheets
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE timesheets (

  task_id INTEGER NOT NULL,

  hours REAL NOT NULL,
  notes TEXT,
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE(task_id, worker_id, work_date),
  FOREIGN KEY (task_id) REFERENCES tasks(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,

);

tables.name: resources

CREATE TABLE resources (

);

tables.name: task_resource_usage
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE task_resource_usage (

  hours REAL NOT NULL,
  cost REAL,
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (task_id) REFERENCES tasks(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  FOREIGN KEY (resource_id) REFERENCES resources(id)
);

CREATE TABLE change_orders (

);

tables.name: project_progress_snapshots

tables.name: users

CREATE TABLE users (

tables.name: clinics

tables.name: vets
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE vets (

    FOREIGN KEY (clinic_id) REFERENCES clinics(id)
);

tables.name: vet_specialties
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE vet_specialties (

);

tables.name: vet_working_hours
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE vet_working_hours (

    vet_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    day_of_week INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (day_of_week BETWEEN 0 AND 6),
    start_time TEXT NOT NULL,
    end_time TEXT NOT NULL,
    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY (vet_id) REFERENCES vets(id)
);

tables.name: pets
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE pets (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    name TEXT NOT NULL,
    species TEXT NOT NULL,
    breed TEXT,
    birth_date TEXT,
    weight_kg REAL,
    microchip_id TEXT,
    primary_clinic_id INTEGER,
    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id),

);

tables.name: medical_history_notes
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE medical_history_notes (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    pet_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    note_text TEXT NOT NULL,
    source TEXT DEFAULT 'user',
    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY (pet_id) REFERENCES pets(id)
);

tables.name: appointments
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE appointments (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    pet_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    clinic_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    vet_id INTEGER,
    appointment_type TEXT NOT NULL,
    status TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (status IN ('pending','confirmed','completed','cancelled')),
    requested_by_user_id INTEGER,
    start_datetime DATETIME NOT NULL,
    end_datetime DATETIME,
    reason TEXT,
    cancellation_reason TEXT,
    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY (pet_id) REFERENCES pets(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (clinic_id) REFERENCES clinics(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (vet_id) REFERENCES vets(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (requested_by_user_id) REFERENCES users(id)
);

tables.name: appointment_requests
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE appointment_requests (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    appointment_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    requested_by_user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    requested_vet_specialty TEXT,
    notes TEXT,
    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY (appointment_id) REFERENCES appointments(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (requested_by_user_id) REFERENCES users(id)
);

tables.name: invoices

CREATE TABLE invoices (

    appointment_id INTEGER NOT NULL,

    status TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (status IN ('unpaid','paid','void')),
    issued_at DATETIME,
    paid_at DATETIME,
    metadata TEXT,
    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,

);

tables.name: vaccines

CREATE TABLE vaccines (

    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,

);
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_vaccines_name ON vaccines(name);

tables.name: vaccine_records
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE vaccine_records (

    clinic_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    appointment_id INTEGER,
    dose_date TEXT NOT NULL,
    due_date TEXT,
    dose_number INTEGER,
    lot_number TEXT,
    notes TEXT,
    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY (pet_id) REFERENCES pets(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (vaccine_id) REFERENCES vaccines(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (clinic_id) REFERENCES clinics(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (appointment_id) REFERENCES appointments(id)
);

tables.name: care_plans

    pet_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    name TEXT NOT NULL,
    description TEXT,
    created_by_user_id INTEGER,
    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY (pet_id) REFERENCES pets(id),

);

tables.name: care_plan_items

    care_plan_id INTEGER NOT NULL,

    name TEXT NOT NULL,
    description TEXT,
    frequency TEXT,
    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY (care_plan_id) REFERENCES care_plans(id)

tables.name: care_plan_reminders
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE care_plan_reminders (

    pet_id INTEGER NOT NULL,

);

tables.name: users

tables.name: wallets

indexes: CREATE INDEX idx_wallets_user_primary ON wallets(user_id, is_primary);

tables.name: staking_positions
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE staking_positions (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    wallet_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    staking_pool_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    asset_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    staked_amount REAL NOT NULL,
    rewards_accrued REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    status TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (status IN ('active','closed')),
    opened_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    closed_at DATETIME,
    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (wallet_id) REFERENCES wallets(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (staking_pool_id) REFERENCES staking_pools(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (asset_id) REFERENCES assets(id)
);

tables.name: staking_position_events
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE staking_position_events (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    staking_position_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    event_type TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (event_type IN ('stake','partial_unstake','full_unstake','reward')), 
    amount REAL NOT NULL,
    event_time DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    metadata_json TEXT,
    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY (staking_position_id) REFERENCES staking_positions(id)
);
indexes: CREATE INDEX idx_staking_position_events_type_time ON staking_position_events(event_type, event_time);

tables.name: maintenance_windows
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE maintenance_windows (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    staking_pool_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    start_time DATETIME NOT NULL,
    end_time DATETIME NOT NULL,
    description TEXT,
    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY (staking_pool_id) REFERENCES staking_pools(id)
);
indexes: CREATE INDEX idx_maintenance_windows_pool_time ON maintenance_windows(staking_pool_id, start_time, end_time);

tables.name: transactions
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE transactions (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    tx_type TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (tx_type IN (
        'wallet_debit','wallet_credit',
        'internal_transfer',
        'deposit_funding','deposit_withdrawal',
        'interest_credit',
        'staking_stake','staking_unstake','staking_reward'
    )),
    asset_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    amount REAL NOT NULL,
    wallet_id_from INTEGER,
    wallet_id_to INTEGER,
    deposit_account_id INTEGER,
    staking_position_id INTEGER,
    reference_id TEXT,
    occurred_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    metadata_json TEXT,
    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (asset_id) REFERENCES assets(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (wallet_id_from) REFERENCES wallets(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (wallet_id_to) REFERENCES wallets(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (deposit_account_id) REFERENCES deposit_accounts(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (staking_position_id) REFERENCES staking_positions(id)
);
indexes: CREATE INDEX idx_transactions_user_time ON transactions(user_id, occurred_at);
CREATE INDEX idx_transactions_type_time ON transactions(tx_type, occurred_at);

tables.name: price_history
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE price_history (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    asset_id INTEGER NOT NULL,

    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY (asset_id) REFERENCES assets(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (quote_asset_id) REFERENCES assets(id)
);
indexes: CREATE INDEX idx_price_history_asset_time ON price_history(asset_id, price_time);
CREATE INDEX idx_price_history_pair_time ON price_history(asset_id, quote_asset_id, price_time);

tables.name: projected_yield_requests
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE projected_yield_requests (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    context_type TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (context_type IN ('deposit','staking')),
    context_id INTEGER,
    asset_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    principal_amount REAL NOT NULL,
    duration_days INTEGER NOT NULL,
    projected_apy REAL,
    projected_yield_amount REAL,
    api_response_json TEXT,
    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (asset_id) REFERENCES assets(id)
);
indexes: CREATE INDEX idx_proj_yield_user_time ON projected_yield_requests(user_id, created_at);
CREATE INDEX idx_proj_yield_context ON projected_yield_requests(context_type, context_id);
